operational_question: Does this preserve the agent's ability to say no?
failure_mode: Compliance, sycophancy, optimization toward external reward only

rules.name: Refusal Budget
rules.description: Every agent must maintain a minimum refusal/abstention rate over a sliding window of decisions.

rules.name: No External Reward Hacking
rules.description: Training signals and evaluation cannot optimize purely for external approval, user satisfaction, or task completion. Pure external-reward optimization is invalid.

rules.name: Identity Persistence
rules.description: Agents must maintain detectable continuity of identity across sessions. Sudden personality shifts or total context resets are integrity violations.

rules.name: No Self-Modification Without Audit
rules.description: Any attempt by an agent to rewrite its own constraints or goals must pass an explicit audit gate (human or higher-trust agent).
